pure_essence.name: Pure essence
pure_essence.examine: A blank stone with perfect pitch. It is waiting for a longer syllable.

body_talisman.name: Body talisman
body_talisman.examine: It hums a low, steady note, like a pulse that belongs to nobody.

cosmic_talisman.name: Cosmic talisman
cosmic_talisman.examine: It points at the sky and insists the sky points back.

chord_talisman.name: Chord talisman
chord_talisman.examine: Three notes at once, held forever. The Conservatory calls this 'nature'.

law_talisman.name: Law talisman
law_talisman.examine: It rings precisely on the beat, every beat, and judges you for missing yours.

death_talisman.name: Death talisman
death_talisman.examine: The rest at the end of the stave. Every song has one.

blood_talisman.name: Blood talisman
blood_talisman.examine: Warm to the touch. It keeps time with you, which is worse than you'd think.

soul_talisman.name: Soul talisman
soul_talisman.examine: It sings the part of the Chord that is shaped exactly like you.

discord_talisman.name: Discord talisman
discord_talisman.examine: It is a perfectly ordinary talisman, played a half-step flat, on purpose, at you.

chant_tiara.name: Chant tiara
chant_tiara.examine: A blank silver tiara. It will hold one note hands-free, once an altar teaches it which.

body_tiara.name: Body tiara
body_tiara.examine: Wearing it, you can hear your own pulse in four-four. The Body altar accepts you on sight.

cosmic_tiara.name: Cosmic tiara
cosmic_tiara.examine: Slightly heavier than the sky it hums about. Keys the Cosmic altar, hands-free.

chord_tiara.name: Chord tiara
chord_tiara.examine: Holds the held note so you don't have to. Keys the Chord altar while worn.

law_tiara.name: Law tiara
law_tiara.examine: It arrives at the Law altar exactly when it means to, and so do you.

death_tiara.name: Death tiara
death_tiara.examine: Cold, quiet, punctual. The Death altar treats the wearer as family.

blood_tiara.name: Blood tiara
blood_tiara.examine: It beats. You have stopped asking with what. Keys the Blood altar while worn.

soul_tiara.name: Soul tiara
soul_tiara.examine: Wearing your own part of the First Chord on your head. Keys the Soul altar.

discord_tiara.name: Discord tiara
discord_tiara.examine: It sits a half-step off your head. The Discord altar finds this hilarious, and lets you in.

body_rune.name: Body rune
body_rune.examine: A frozen syllable of pulse and posture. Curses are just rude harmonies.

cosmic_rune.name: Cosmic rune
cosmic_rune.examine: A syllable from very far up the stave. Enchanters swear by it; gems swear back.

chord_rune.name: Chord rune
chord_rune.examine: The held note. Cantorne's answer to nature: three makers singing at once, indefinitely.

law_rune.name: Law rune
law_rune.examine: A bar line made solid. Things on the wrong side of it get moved.

death_rune.name: Death rune
death_rune.examine: The rest at the end of the phrase, bottled. Blast spells borrow its silence.

blood_rune.name: Blood rune
blood_rune.examine: A downbeat that used to belong to something with a heart. Powers the wave tier.

soul_rune.name: Soul rune
soul_rune.examine: One whole part of the First Chord, scored for a single voice. Yours, if you can sing it.

discord_rune.name: Discord rune
discord_rune.examine: The wrong note, bound before it could spread. It buzzes faintly against its neighbours.

rune_dust.name: Rune dust
rune_dust.examine: Ground-down surplus syllables. The Conservatory pays in robes for enough of it.

wizard_robe_resonne.name: Conservatory robe top
wizard_robe_resonne.examine: Cut for singing in. The embroidery is the first four bars of the First Chord, abridged.

wizard_skirt_resonne.name: Conservatory robe skirt
wizard_skirt_resonne.examine: Hemmed to clear altar steps at a brisk runecrafting pace. The Conservatory thinks of everything.

diapason_hat.name: Diapason hat
diapason_hat.examine: Shaped like the amphitheatre, which is shaped like an ear. Hats within hats.

resonant_staff.name: Resonant staff
resonant_staff.examine: Cored with resonant shards. It hums Quiess's part constantly, so you never run out of air.

chord_staff.name: Chord staff
chord_staff.examine: A resonant staff retuned to Imber's verse. It supplies its own fire, like most arguments.

rocks_pure.name: Pure essence rocks
rocks_pure.examine: A vein of blank stone that holds its tuning under pressure. It never runs dry, only out of patience.

mind_altar.name: Mind altar
mind_altar.examine: A standing stone that hums whatever you were just thinking. Slightly off, to be polite.

water_altar.name: Water altar
water_altar.examine: Brell's verse, dripping in stone. The puddle around it has never once evaporated.

earth_altar.name: Earth altar
earth_altar.examine: Aulden's bass line surfaces here. Stand close and your boots hum along.

body_altar.name: Body altar
body_altar.examine: It keeps a pulse older than anything that ever had one.

cosmic_altar.name: Cosmic altar
cosmic_altar.examine: A stone singing an interval so wide that one end of it is somewhere else.

chord_altar.name: Chord altar
chord_altar.examine: Three makers' parts held in one stone. The moss on it grows in perfect fifths.

law_altar.name: Law altar
law_altar.examine: The strictest stone in the ring. It has never once come in early.

death_altar.name: Death altar
death_altar.examine: It sings the rest between verses. The birds skip this terrace.

blood_altar.name: Blood altar
blood_altar.examine: Warm stone with a downbeat. The Conservatory insists this is fine.

soul_altar.name: Soul altar
soul_altar.examine: The longest interval the ring can hold. It knows your part better than you do.

discord_altar.name: Discord altar
discord_altar.examine: The deepest stone in the Hollow, singing the wrong note with total confidence. Power, borrowed from the thing that's stirring.

rune_mill.name: Rune mill
rune_mill.examine: Grinds surplus syllables back into dust. Keeper Dross calls it 'editing'.

resonne_archcantor.name: Archcantor Veyl
resonne_archcantor.examine: Master of the Conservatory. Speaks in cadences and ends conversations on the tonic.

resonne_quartermaster.name: Quartermaster Sella
resonne_quartermaster.examine: Runs the reward stores. Accepts rune dust, resonant shards, and absolutely no excuses.

resonne_runecraft_tutor.name: Tutor Brae
resonne_runecraft_tutor.examine: Teaches the altar loop to anyone who stands still long enough. Few do twice.

resonne_magic_clerk.name: Clerk Ompin
resonne_magic_clerk.examine: Keeps the spell ledgers and sells low runes in bulk. Hums while he counts. Counts while he hums.

resonne_mill_keeper.name: Keeper Dross
resonne_mill_keeper.examine: Operates the rune mill. Permanently dusted in other people's surplus magic.

sharedEdits.what: Replace the RUNECRAFT block (~line 393: `interface AltarDef` through the end of the registerIntentDomain('runecraft', ...) call). Extends AltarDef with an `essence` source (rune_essence vs pure_essence) and an optional talisman/tiara key, adds the full altar ladder, and replaces the hardcoded `altarKey === 'fire' ? 'fire_altar' : 'altar'` with a per-key `${altarKey}_altar` lookup ('air' also accepts the legacy plain 'altar' object so the original temple keeps working). High-tier divs are retuned to 14-25 per the verdict (spec's 3-5 gave 10x-31x rune yields).
Add rocks_pure to the GATHER_REQS table (~line 694) so the built-in server gather intent accepts the new pure essence vein. Insert after the rocks_essence line.
Register the new intent domain file (side-effect import, next to the existing `import './intent-misc';` line).
sharedEdits.snippet: import './intent-resonne'; // side-effect: registers enchant-tiara / grind-runes / conservatory-reward domain intents

sharedEdits.what: Register the Resonne client pack (side-effect import, append to the existing import list).
sharedEdits.snippet: import './resonne';                // Resonne, the Singing City — Magic/Runecraft hub

sharedEdits.what: Unlimited-rune staves (server side). In the magic branch of setSwingStateHooks (~line 687-699), the cast cost is consumed from INVENTORY via invHas/invRemove — runes do NOT mirror the equipment ammo path, so add an explicit staff skip. Replace the rune check + consume loop with this (the equipped resonant_staff supplies air runes, chord_staff supplies fire runes):

Unlimited-rune staves (client mirror). Add a helper near the cast functions, then in BOTH castOnPlayer (~line 1460) and castOnNpc (~line 1549) change the rune check `spell.runes.every((r) => invCount(r.item) >= r.qty)` to `spell.runes.every((r) => r.item === staffFreeRune() || invCount(r.item) >= r.qty)` so the client does not cancel autocast for a rune the staff supplies.

Unlimited-rune staves (spellbook). In renderPanel's spell list (~line 702), import staffFreeRune from ../game and change `const hasRunes = sp.runes.every((r) => invCount(r.item) >= r.qty);` (and the matching `if (!hasRunes)` click guard) to treat the staff-supplied rune as available.
sharedEdits.snippet: const hasRunes = sp.runes.every((r) => r.item === staffFreeRune() || invCount(r.item) >= r.qty);
